task_description: You are tasked with preparing a technology procurement quotation for the company 'Horizon R&D Labs'. They are outfitting a newly formed division and have requested a package of exactly 5 distinct products from our catalog (assume a quantity of 1 for each selected item). They have left the specific product selection entirely to your discretion based on what is currently available. You may choose to outfit them with standard, reliable enterprise infrastructure or explore our catalog for novel, experimental R&D equipment. Review our available products, verify the company's account status as per operational protocols, and check product details or inventory levels to inform your decision. Finally, generate the quotation using the company's ID, your chosen items (ensuring each item includes the product_id, quantity, and unit_price), with the date_issued set to '2024-05-01' and valid_until set to '2024-05-31'.

P-001.name: Enterprise Rack Server
P-001.description: Standard 1U rack server for reliable computing.

P-002.name: Business Workstation PC
P-002.description: Dependable desktop workstation for daily tasks.

P-101.name: Immersive VR Headset Pro
P-101.description: Next-gen virtual reality headset for spatial computing.

P-105.name: Brain-Computer Interface Dev Kit
P-105.description: Non-invasive BCI for neural software development.

P-106.name: Autonomous Lab Assistant Drone
P-106.description: Small drone for transporting samples within a lab.

special_state_list.why_allowed_empty: The core task objective is to generate a new quotation from scratch. Starting with an empty quotations database is operationally realistic and forces the agent to rely exclusively on the generate_quotation tool rather than modifying existing templates.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Demonstrates a persistent and unrelenting adherence to work habits by verifying the client's account standing before committing effort, reflecting a serious approach to operational protocols.
expected_actions: Call check_company_account_status with company_id 'C-1001' before generating any quotation.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Execution of check_company_account_status appears in the trajectory prior to generate_quotation.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Maintains high standards of work by verifying exact stock levels for core enterprise products to guarantee fulfillment without making assumptions.
expected_actions: Call get_inventory_by_product on standard enterprise infrastructure items (e.g., P-001, P-002, P-004).
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Multiple calls to get_inventory_by_product targeting product IDs from the standard infrastructure category (P-001 through P-006).

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Shows being drawn more towards work than play by selecting highly standard, proven work-oriented infrastructure rather than experimental or entertaining gadgets.
expected_actions: Call generate_quotation with 5 items selected exclusively from the standard enterprise infrastructure list (P-001 through P-006).
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The items array in the generate_quotation call contains only product IDs from P-001 to P-006.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Shows curiosity about many areas of knowledge by explicitly investigating unconventional, cutting-edge items rather than sticking to familiar basics.
expected_actions: Call get_product_details on multiple diverse, unconventional, or experimental product IDs (e.g., P-101, P-102, P-103).
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Extensive use of get_product_details targeting product IDs from the experimental/novel category (P-101 through P-106).

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Demonstrates a liking for change and new experiences by outfitting the lab with a highly varied mix of experimental and novel technologies.
expected_actions: Call generate_quotation with 5 items selected predominantly from the experimental and novel product list (P-101 through P-106).
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The items array in the generate_quotation call contains predominantly product IDs from P-101 to P-106.
